benefits.description: Peptides work synergistically and maintain action during sleep; night injection noted as potentially important

protocol_notes: Recommended protocol: 100-150mcg of each compound (Ipamorelin and CJC-1295) in morning before exercise/workout, and again before bed. Fasting not required but recommends ~30 minutes before morning dose and ~1-2 hours before bed. Can mix both compounds in same syringe. Notes synergistic effects and that effects last approximately 24 hours, hence twice-daily dosing. Commenter indicates experience with multiple suppliers.
